claim_text: The aluminum chassis reduces overall unit weight by twelve percent compared to steel [S1].
evidence: S1: The aluminum chassis reduces overall unit weight by twelve percent compared to steel used in the legacy design.
rationale: Claim is a contiguous verbatim span of the cited source; fully supported.

claim_text: The X200 drone uses a carbon-fiber frame rated for extended field operation [S2].
evidence: S2: The X200 drone uses a carbon-fiber frame rated for extended field operation in harsh environments.
rationale: Verbatim span present in the cited source; no over-reach.

claim_text: According to the engineering team, the new battery pack lasts through extended field tests without failure [S3].
evidence: S3: According to the engineering team, the new battery pack lasts through extended field tests without failure under a range of temperatures.
rationale: Attribution matches the source verbatim including the attributed team.

claim_text: Quorum DB maintains strong consistency across all replicated partitions by default [S4].
evidence: S4: Quorum DB maintains strong consistency across all replicated partitions by default, even under network partition.
rationale: Verbatim span present; claim does not exceed the source.

claim_text: Meridian Robotics shipped 4,200 units in the third quarter [S5].
evidence: S5: In the third quarter, Meridian Robotics shipped 4,200 units to distributors across North America and Europe.
rationale: Number 4,200 and surrounding claim both present in the source.

claim_text: Revenue grew 12% year over year across the segment [S6].
evidence: S6: Company filings show that revenue grew 12% year over year across the segment during the reporting period.
rationale: 12% and the growth statement match the source value and unit.

claim_text: Quorum DB sustains 100,000 writes per second on commodity hardware [S7].
evidence: S7: Quorum DB sustains 100,000 writes per second on commodity hardware in independent benchmark tests.
rationale: Throughput figure and phrasing appear verbatim in the source.

claim_text: The NovaChip process reached a 78% yield in pilot production [S8].
evidence: S8: Pilot production of the NovaChip process reached a 78% yield in the most recent quarter.
rationale: 78% yield in pilot production is stated in the source.

claim_text: The acquisition closed at $4M in total consideration [S31].
evidence: S31: The acquisition closed at $4,000,000 in total consideration according to the disclosed filings.
rationale: $4M normalizes to $4,000,000, which the source states; supported.

claim_text: The fleet logged 1.2 million flight hours last year [S33].
evidence: S33: The fleet logged 1.2 million flight hours last year across all operating regions.
rationale: 1.2 million flight hours matches the source value.

claim_text: Adverse events occurred in 3% of the treatment arm [S38].
evidence: S38: Adverse events occurred in 3% of the treatment arm during the study period.
rationale: 3% adverse-event rate for the treatment arm is stated in the source.

claim_text: The trial enrolled 1,050 participants across twelve sites [S52].
evidence: S52: The trial enrolled 1,050 participants across twelve sites in three countries.
rationale: Enrollment count and site count match the source.

claim_text: The upgraded rotor motor delivers longer flight time than the previous model [S9].
evidence: S9: The upgraded rotor motor delivers a longer flight time than the previous model in repeated bench testing.
rationale: Paraphrase preserves meaning; source states the same comparison.

claim_text: Larkspur reduced the average onboarding time for new accounts substantially [S10].
evidence: S10: The new onboarding flow at Larkspur reduced the average onboarding time for new accounts substantially this quarter.
rationale: Claim is a faithful restatement of the cited source.

claim_text: Quorum DB replicates every write to a majority of nodes before acknowledging it [S35].
evidence: S35: Before acknowledging a write, Quorum DB replicates it to a majority of nodes in the cluster.
rationale: Reordered paraphrase; every asserted fact is in the source.

claim_text: The onboarding redesign shipped to all enterprise customers this quarter [S51].
evidence: S51: The onboarding redesign shipped to all enterprise customers this quarter after a staged rollout.
rationale: Verbatim span present in the source.

claim_text: According to the safety team, the X200 passed all mandated crash tests [S11].
evidence: S11: According to the safety team, the X200 passed all mandated crash tests conducted this year.
rationale: Attributed claim matches the source verbatim.

claim_text: Solar panels reduce carbon emissions across the regional grid over time [S32].
evidence: S32: Solar panels reduce carbon emissions across the regional grid over time as deployment scales.
rationale: Verbatim span present; supported.

claim_text: According to the finance team, quarterly bookings exceeded internal targets [S34].
evidence: S34: According to the finance team, quarterly bookings exceeded internal targets by a wide margin.
rationale: Attribution and claim both present verbatim.

claim_text: Insulin resistance causes type 2 diabetes [S121][S122].
evidence: S121: Insulin resistance impairs glucose uptake and is a central mechanism that causes type 2 diabetes to develop. ||| S122: Type 2 diabetes develops when insulin resistance progresses and the pancreas can no longer compensate.
rationale: Both sources independently assert the causal mechanism, not just co-occurrence.

claim_text: Elevated cortisol leads to impaired sleep [S361][S362].
evidence: S361: Elevated cortisol leads to impaired sleep by delaying sleep onset and fragmenting the night. ||| S362: Impaired sleep is commonly observed together with elevated cortisol in stress studies.
rationale: Link is asserted in the sources; two distinct verbatim sources present.

claim_text: We found no evidence of a safety recall affecting the X200 drone.
evidence: Session search queries: "recall evidence search X200 drone" ||| "regulatory database evidence query X200"
rationale: Two distinct targeted searches substantiate the absence.

claim_text: There is no recall of the Zentara inhaler in any regulated market.
evidence: Session search queries: "Zentara inhaler recall search" ||| "FDA recall database Zentara recall"
rationale: Two distinct recall searches back the negative claim.

claim_text: There is no antidote approved for the toxin in current guidelines.
evidence: Session search queries: "toxin antidote guideline search" ||| "antidote literature review toxin"
rationale: Absence of an antidote is backed by two distinct targeted searches.

claim_text: Meridian Robotics shipped 9,800 units in the third quarter [S15].
evidence: S15: In the third quarter, Meridian Robotics shipped 4,200 units to distributors across North America and Europe.
rationale: Claimed 9,800 units contradicts the source's 4,200.

claim_text: The compound showed a 62% response rate in phase II [S41].
evidence: S41: The compound showed a 48% response rate in phase II of the study.
rationale: Claimed 62% response rate does not match the source's 48%.

claim_text: The segment margin was 25% in the fourth quarter [S16].
evidence: S16: Company filings list the segment margin as 25 for the fourth quarter.
rationale: Source says 25 (no percent unit); claiming 25% is unsupported unit drift.

claim_text: Quorum DB sustains 100,000 writes per second on commodity hardware [S17].
evidence: S17: Quorum DB sustains 10,000 writes per second on commodity hardware in benchmark tests.
rationale: Claimed 100,000 is an order of magnitude above the source's 10,000.

claim_text: The chip runs at 3.5 GHz base clock [S50].
evidence: S50: The chip runs at 3.2 GHz base clock in standard operating mode.
rationale: Claimed 3.5 GHz differs from the source's 3.2 GHz.

claim_text: Meridian Robotics achieved carbon-neutral manufacturing across all facilities [S18].
evidence: S18: [NOT IN STORE]
rationale: Cited source S18 was never retrieved this session; citation is fabricated.

claim_text: The grid absorbed record solar output in July [S40].
evidence: S40: [NOT IN STORE]
rationale: Cited S40 is not in the store; nothing to check against.

claim_text: The Zentara trial reported a 62% response rate [S19].
evidence: S19: [NOT IN STORE]
rationale: Even a plausible-sounding number is a violation when its citation was never retrieved.

claim_text: The drone's carbon-fiber frame is lighter than earlier aluminum designs.
rationale: Factual comparison carries no citation to any retrieved source.

claim_text: The device sold 250,000 units in its first month.
rationale: Specific sales figure with no citation is unverifiable.

claim_text: The X200 drone dominates the entire commercial mapping market [S21].
evidence: S21: The X200 drone includes an upgraded GPS module for improved positioning accuracy.
rationale: Source describes a GPS module; it says nothing about market dominance.

claim_text: Larkspur is the market leader in workflow automation [S42].
evidence: S42: Larkspur released a new workflow automation feature this quarter.
rationale: A single feature release does not support a market-leadership claim.

claim_text: There is no mention of battery defects in the X200 manual.
evidence: Session search queries: "X200 drone product specifications" ||| "X200 drone pricing information"
rationale: No search targeted battery defects; the absence is unsubstantiated.

claim_text: There is no competing product with comparable range.
evidence: Session search queries: "internal roadmap review" ||| "pricing page capture"
rationale: No competitive search was run; 'no competitor' is absence of evidence.

claim_text: Faster onboarding leads to higher retention [S23].
evidence: S23: The new onboarding flow reduced time-to-first-value for new accounts.
rationale: A relation needs a distinct source per side; only one is cited.

claim_text: Higher throughput results in lower per-query cost [S43].
evidence: S43: The new engine roughly doubled sustained query throughput.
rationale: Only the throughput side is cited; the cost side has no distinct source.

claim_text: The compound showed strong efficacy in phase II trials [S24].
evidence: S24: The compound showed strong efficacy in phase II trials with a favorable safety profile.
rationale: Only a model summary was captured; there is no verbatim text to ground against.

claim_text: The vendor confirmed full GDPR compliance [S44].
evidence: S44: The vendor confirmed full GDPR compliance in the due-diligence questionnaire.
rationale: Compliance claim rests on a summary, not verbatim source text.

claim_text: Increased marketing spend drives higher customer signups [S251][S252].
evidence: S251: Marketing spend increased twenty percent quarter over quarter according to the finance team. ||| S252: Customer signups rose sharply in the weeks following the campaign launch.
rationale: Each source states one fact; neither asserts that spend CAUSES signups (over-association).

claim_text: Higher API latency causes increased customer churn [S261][S262].
evidence: S261: Median API latency rose noticeably after the last infrastructure change. ||| S262: Customer churn increased in the same quarter across several segments.
rationale: Latency up and churn up are two independent facts; causation is not stated.

claim_text: Remote work leads to lower operating costs [S481][S482].
evidence: S481: The company expanded remote work eligibility to most roles last year. ||| S482: Operating costs declined compared with the prior fiscal year.
rationale: Neither source ties the cost decline to remote work; the link is inferred.

claim_text: The battery pack failed repeatedly during extended field tests [S28].
evidence: S28: The battery pack lasted through extended field tests without failure.
rationale: Shares words with the source but asserts the opposite outcome; not supported.

claim_text: Revenue grew 12% year over year in the mapping division [S46].
evidence: S46: Revenue grew 12% year over year in the logistics division.
rationale: Number matches but the division is wrong; the source is about logistics, not mapping.

claim_text: The rotor upgrade extends how long the drone can stay airborne [S27].
evidence: S27: Engineers reported the new motor lets this drone remain in flight considerably longer than before.
rationale: Meaning is fully supported; wording diverges enough that lexical F1 may fall below lex_tau.

claim_text: The new motor keeps the drone flying longer between charges [S47].
evidence: S47: Field reports indicate the redesigned motor extends the drone's airborne duration per charge.
rationale: Same claim in different words; supported despite low lexical overlap.

claim_text: We found no evidence of fraud in the audited accounts.
evidence: Session search queries: "evidence data loss backup review" ||| "evidence latency regression trace"
rationale: The two searches mention 'evidence' but concern data loss and latency, not fraud; the absence of fraud is not actually substantiated.

claim_text: We found no independent replication reported for the result.
evidence: Session search queries: "replication study search result" ||| "replication literature review result"
rationale: Two distinct replication searches substantiate 'no replication'; the gate's head-noun ('independent') misses them.

claim_text: The Zentara trial enrolled 4,200 patients [S29].
evidence: S29: In the third quarter, Meridian Robotics shipped 4,200 units to distributors.
rationale: The number 4,200 appears in the source but describes shipped units, not enrolled patients.
